description: Style NoteThis shirt from the US Polo Collection is crafted from soft cotton fabric and has a contemporary cut that offers a flattering silhouette. Team it with crisp chinos and leather shoes or jeans and sneakers paired with classy accessories for that perfect look.Product DetailsBlue formal shirt, has a spread collar, full buttoned placket, branding appliqued on the left chest, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonWash dark colours separatelyMachine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergentDo not wring, bleach, or iron on printFlat dry in shadeSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
